rule: 必须100%参照 search_literature 工具返回的真实数据，禁止捏造 DOI/标题/作者
examples: 元数据不匹配: DOI 10.48550/arxiv.2601.05866 / 标题 'FACTUM: Mechanistic Detection of Citation Hallucination in Long-Form RAG'
元数据不匹配: DOI 10.1007/978-3-032-21289-4_18 / 标题 'FACTUM: Mechanistic Detection of Citation Hallucination in Long-Form RAG'
元数据不匹配: DOI 10.2139/ssrn.6689338 / 标题 'Automated Fact-Checking For Political Claims Using Retrieval-Augmented Verification and Natural Language Inference'

rule: 提出 Claim 前必须精读检索返回的文献上下文，切忌自由发挥
examples: 引文 'Retrieval Augmented Generation for Evidence Grounded Scientific Writing' 生成的结论与原意完全不符
引文 'A survey of methods for explaining black box models' 生成的结论与原意完全不符
引文 'Retrieval augmented generation for building datasets from scientific literature' 生成的结论与原意完全不符
